queries.question: What dissertations were supervised by Dr. Jane Smith and what thesis proposals did she also supervise?
queries.sql:
SELECT Dissertations.title
FROM Dissertations
WHERE Dissertations.Academic_Supervisor = "Dr. Jane Smith"
UNION
SELECT Thesis_Proposals.title
FROM Thesis_Proposals
WHERE Thesis_Proposals.Academic_Supervisor = "Dr. Jane Smith"

queries.question: List all dissertations and also list thesis proposals supervised by Dr. Jane Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Dissertations.title
FROM Dissertations
UNION
SELECT Thesis_Proposals.title
FROM Thesis_Proposals
WHERE Thesis_Proposals.Academic_Supervisor = "Dr. Jane Smith"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me dissertations and thesis proposals supervised by Dr. Jane Smith.
